name: obsidian-llm-wiki
description: LLM Wiki pattern for an active Obsidian vault. Eleven skills (wiki-init, wiki-ingest, wiki-scan, wiki-query, wiki-save, wiki-lint, wiki-hot, wiki-tags-refresh, wiki-schema, wiki-task, wiki-tasks-extract) compile knowledge from meetings, projects, daily notes, and raw sources into a persistent, cross-referenced wiki at wiki/. Includes task management: create individual tasks from natural language and batch-extract tasks from wiki content. Supports GitHub Copilot and Claude Code as first-class agents.
